name: Western Union
description_short: Western Sun Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit credit union serving Oklahoma with competitive auto loans, savings accounts, and deposit products.
description_long:
Western Sun Federal Credit Union (WSFCU) is a federally chartered credit union headquartered in Broken Arrow, Oklahoma, with multiple branch locations across the Tulsa metro area and surrounding communities. The credit union operates as a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution serving individuals and families in Oklahoma who qualify for membership. The organization has been actively serving its community with a mission focused on friendly, professional service and personalized member care.

WSFCU offers a range of financial products including auto loans (new and used vehicles at rates as low as 5.49% APR), boat loans, certificate of deposit accounts (up to 3.46% APY), money market accounts, checking accounts with rewards features (Kasasa Cash Back Checking offering 3% cash back on debit purchases), and savings accounts. The credit union also provides mortgage lending, online banking services, and personal financial education resources. Their loan products are competitively priced and subject to standard credit approval processes.

What distinguishes Western Sun FCU is its focus on community engagement and member benefits. The institution regularly hosts community events (Shred Day, Car Shows, electronics recycling), provides free auto-buying resources, and publishes extensive financial education content on topics ranging from credit scores to debt consolidation to avoiding scams. Their Kasasa Cash Back Checking account offers a tangible rewards benefit for active debit card users. The credit union maintains multiple physical branches with extended hours including Saturday drive-up service, providing convenient access for members.

As a credit union, WSFCU is NCUA-insured (member deposits protected up to $250,000), distinguishing it from for-profit banks. However, membership eligibility may be restricted based on geography or employer affiliation—the website does not clearly detail membership requirements. Interest rates and terms are subject to change and credit approval, meaning advertised rates may not be available to all applicants. The institution's offerings are solid but fairly standard for regional credit unions.
pros: Auto loan rates as low as 5.49% APR for new vehicles with online and in-person application options
Kasasa Cash Back Checking provides 3% cash back on debit card purchases up to $400 per cycle
Certificate of deposit rates up to 3.46% APY, competitive for deposit products
Multiple branch locations (Broken Arrow, Bixby, Downtown Tulsa) with extended hours including Saturday drive-up service
NCUA insurance protection on member deposits up to $250,000
Active community engagement with regular financial education events, free resource tools, and member testimonials
Online banking and loan application capabilities available
cons: Membership eligibility requirements not clearly disclosed on website, may restrict who can join
All advertised rates are subject to change without notice and require credit approval, limiting guaranteed availability
Limited information about personal loan products or unsecured lending options beyond auto/boat loans
No mention of mobile app functionality or advanced digital banking features compared to larger institutions
Geographic limitation to Oklahoma service area reduces accessibility for out-of-state consumers
best_for: Oklahoma residents seeking competitively-priced auto financing with local branch access
Active debit card users interested in cash back rewards through Kasasa checking accounts
Credit union members prioritizing community-oriented financial institutions with educational resources
Savers seeking higher-yield certificate of deposit accounts in the 3%+ APY range
diagnosis: Western Sun FCU is best for Oklahoma residents who qualify for membership and seek competitive auto financing or savings products with local branch convenience and community engagement. The main caveat is that membership eligibility is not clearly defined on their website, and all advertised rates require individual credit approval, so actual terms may vary significantly from listed rates.
services: New and used auto loans (5.49% APR)
Kasasa Cash Back Checking with 3% rewards
In-person and drive-up branch services with Saturday hours
meta_title: Western Sun — Credit Union in Broken Arrow, OK | CreditDoc
meta_description: Western Sun — NCUA-insured credit union in Broken Arrow, OK. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
